ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the parameter */,
  "nom_value" REAL /* Nominal (default) value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the parameter */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the parameter was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last updated the parameter */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the parameter was last updated */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product line the parameter belongs to */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the parameter (e.g., electrical, mechanical, thermal) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the parameter (e.g., active, deprecated, under review) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the parameter was last approved */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who approved the parameter */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the parameter is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, quality assurance, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user has administrative privileges */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product line was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
